data.title: Altcoin slump: Fartcoin drops 28%, Hyperliquid sees $84M liquidation amid volatility surge.
data.description: The volatility of altcoins surged notably as Fartcoin experienced a significant 28% decline from its highest point. Concurrently, Hyperliquid witnessed liquidations totaling $84 million.

data.title: VERSABANK ANNOUNCES THE RESULTS OF ITS 2026 MEETING OF SHAREHOLDERS
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in London, Ontario, VersaBank (TSX: VBNK) (NASDAQ: VBNK) disclosed the outcomes of its 2026 Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The Meeting in London delivered updates on the nominated directors' results for the Bank.

Lebanon army: 'A specialized army unit has succeeded in fully clearing the Qasmiyeh sea bridge in cooperation with Civil Defense and civil associations, following its targeting in an Israeli attack on 8/4/2026, and one of the military units has been stationed in the vicinity of the bridge.'

data.title: Johnson & Johnson Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Before the markets open on April 14, Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) is set to announce its first quarter earnings. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $2.67 per share, a slight decrease from $2.77 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $23.6 billion, up from $21.89 billion in the previous year. Recently, the company received FDA approval for TECNIS PureSee Intraocular Lens for cataract surgery. Following this news, Johnson & Johnson's stock price rose by 1.2% to close at $241.30 on Wednesday. For more detailed information, readers can visit Benzinga.com to access the latest analyst ratings and insights.

data.title: MySavant.ai Acquires Savant International to Scale AI-Driven Nearshore Operations Across Latin America
data.description: MySavant.ai, based in Coral Springs, Florida, has recently acquired a successful nearshore BPO operator. This acquisition aims to broaden MySavant.ai's delivery reach and introduce AI-powered efficiency and visibility to an existing logistics customer base. The acquisition was made public on April 9, 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds $71,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Slip 3% On Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading at $71,000 amidst a dip in broader markets due to geopolitical uncertainty. On Wednesday, Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $124.6 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $18.6 million in net outflows. The current cryptocurrency ticker prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $71,182, Ethereum (ETH) at $2,193.44, Solana (SOL) at $82.59, XRP at $1.33, Dogecoin (DOGE) at $0.09181, and Shiba Inu (SHIB) at $0.05874. The meme coin market capitalization dropped by 3.5% to $33.8 billion. For more information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Jazz Pharmaceuticals to Present Research on Epidiolex® (cannabidiol) and Xywav® (calcium, magnesium, potassium, and sodium oxybates) Oral Solution at the 2026 American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting
data.description: Jazz Pharmaceuticals showcased six abstracts, with one being presented orally, emphasizing their continued dedication to producing real-world evidence related to rare neurological conditions. These include rare and severe types of epilepsy and sleep disorders. The presentations were made specifically for U.S. media and investors at an event held in Dublin on April 9, 2026.

data.title: CoreWeave Announces Proposed $3.0 Billion Convertible Senior Notes Offering
data.description: CoreWeave, Inc. based in Livingston, N.J., has revealed plans to offer $3.0 billion in convertible senior notes due 2032 (the “Notes”) through a private offering, pending market conditions and other factors. Additionally, CoreWeave intends to provide the initial purchasers of the Notes with an option to acquire an additional amount within a 13-day period from the issuance date. The company is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CRWV.

data.title: Agape Care Group Named USA Today’s Top Workplace for 3rd Consecutive Year
data.description: Agape Care Group, a leading hospice care provider based in Spartanburg, South Carolina, has been recognized with the prestigious USA Today Top Workplaces Award for the third year in a row. This award is a testament to the positive work environment at Agape, as it is solely determined by feedback from employees gathered through a survey conducted by Energage, an independent third-party organization. The survey evaluates various aspects of workplace culture, including fifteen key "Culture Drivers" that are known to correlate with superior performance. This achievement highlights Agape Care Group's commitment to providing an exceptional workplace for its employees.

data.title: Nexalin Announces Peer-Reviewed Study Showing the Company’s DIFS™ Technology Reduced Self-Injury and Depression Symptoms in Female Adolescents
data.description: A recent publication in BMC Psychiatry reveals noteworthy reductions in self-injury behaviors and depressive symptoms with the use of Nexalin's unique non-invasive DIFS approach. The study shows statistically significant improvements in these areas, as well as brain-network findings that support the effectiveness of Nexalin's method.

data.title: WF HOLDING LIMITED Announces 1-for-5 Reverse Share Split
data.description: On April 9, 2026, WF Holding Limited (NASDAQ: WFF), a Malaysian company producing fiberglass reinforced plastic items, disclosed a one-for-five reverse share split for its ordinary shares. This move, ratified by both shareholders and the board of directors, means the company's issued and unissued ordinary shares will merge at a ratio of 1:5. Effective April 13, 2026, the trading of the company's ordinary shares will shift to a split-adjusted status under the symbol "WFF." Post-split, new CUSIP number assigned is G9627R115, with a revised par value of $0.00025 per share.

data.title: Amazon Pharmacy to Offer Eli Lilly and Company’s New GLP-1 Pill Foundayo via Same-Day Delivery
data.description: In Seattle, Amazon Pharmacy (NASDAQ: AMZN) has added Eli Lilly and Company's newly approved GLP-1 medication, Foundayo™, to its offerings. Foundayo™ is a once-daily oral treatment designed for adults struggling with obesity or overweight along with weight-related medical issues. Customers can conveniently order Foundayo through Amazon Pharmacy with a valid prescription. The platform provides real-time availability of the medication and clear pricing details. The service guarantees fast delivery of medications directly to customers' doorsteps.

data.title: Solar A/S: No. 8 2026 Major shareholder announcement
data.description: In accordance with section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, Solar A/S has been notified by UBS Group AG that after selling shares on 7 April 2026, UBS Group AG currently possesses 25,488,400 Solar B shares valued at DKK 100 per share. This equates to a ownership stake of 3.18% in the company.
